mandate: Make the dashboard responsive — collapsible sidebar, stacked inbox, responsive grids
keyFindings: The dashboard used inline styles exclusively — adding responsiveness required matchMedia JS detection rather than CSS media queries
isMobile state is passed as a prop to InboxView and ProfileView from DashboardClient
InboxView uses a mobileShowDetail state for list-to-detail navigation pattern on mobile
Loading skeleton was migrated from Tailwind classes to inline styles with brand colors to match the actual dashboard
whatWorked: Prop-based isMobile detection from DashboardClient passed down to child views. Clean separation: DashboardClient handles sidebar, each view handles its own responsive layout.
recommendationsForNextAgent: interaction-fixer will modify InboxView.tsx and DashboardClient.tsx which now have isMobile state and sidebarOpen state. The mobile sidebar uses a backdrop div — click-outside handlers should not interfere with the backdrop click handler. The InboxView now has mobileShowDetail state that affects which pane is visible.
spiritContribution: The dashboard now works on phones. The core loop (get notified, open dashboard, review escalation, send reply) is possible on mobile for the first time.
